name: @tyvm/knowhow-module-terminal
description: Terminal addon module for @tyvm/knowhow — portless PTY over the tunnel WebSocket

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const{spawnSync}=require('child_process');const os=require('os');const path=require('path');const dirs=['node_modules/node-pty/prebuilds',path.join(os.homedir(),'.knowhow/node_modules/node-pty/prebuilds')];for(const d of dirs){spawnSync('find',[d,'-name','spawn-helper','-exec','chmod','+x','{}',';'],{stdio:'ignore'});}" 2>/dev/null || true

author: Tyvm AI
